summary: Completed all 5 tasks of Phase 2 Coverage Ratchet plan. coverage-ratchet.mjs script created, initial baselines captured, CI workflow wired, regression detection verified, --update mode verified.
learnings: coverage-ratchet.mjs uses import.meta.dirname (Node 21+) -- works fine in project's Node version
CI ternary expression in GitHub Actions selects test:ci on ubuntu and plain test on other OSes
